title: Red Matches, Green Wins
description: Both ingredients share Red+ again. The two-colour rule says Red or Green — but which one?

hints.text: Two-colour rule: pnP has R+, pNn has R+. Red signs match → result is Red or Green. Blue is still impossible.
Check if Red resolves: pnP has R+Small, pNn has R+Small. Signs match but sizes are BOTH Small — same size means Red cannot resolve. Move to Green.
Green: pnP has G-Small, pNn has G-Large. Signs match (both −), sizes differ → G− is the result. The two-colour rule was right: Red or Green. Red couldn't resolve, so Green took over.
